description: Premium corporate website for Sixty Seconds at sixtyseconds.ai — parent company site showcasing product portfolio, services, case studies, and SEO/AEO/GEO-optimised blog.

userStories.title: Project scaffolding and build system
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a new packages/corporate/ package with Vite + React + Tailwind so that the corporate site can be developed and deployed independently.
acceptanceCriteria: packages/corporate/ exists with package.json, vite.config.ts, tailwind.config.js
npm run dev starts dev server on port 5176
npm run build produces static output in dist/
userStories.notes: Must be in monorepo npm workspaces

userStories.title: Site layout shell (navbar + footer + routing)
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want consistent navigation across all pages so that I can explore the site easily.
acceptanceCriteria: Navbar with Logo, Products, Services, Case Studies, Blog, About, Contact + Explore 60 CTA
Footer with company info, product links, social links, legal links
React Router routes for all pages
Dark mode default with optional light toggle

userStories.title: Homepage — hero + company overview
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to immediately understand what Sixty Seconds is and what it offers so that I can decide where to go next.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero with bold headline and company positioning
Primary CTA: Explore 60 linking to use60.com
Credibility bar with animated count-up stats
Dark gradient background with subtle grid lines

userStories.title: Products page — full portfolio grid
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to see all Sixty Seconds products in one place so that I can find the right tool for my needs.
acceptanceCriteria: Each card links to external product domain in new tab
userStories.notes: Categories: AI Platform, Video, Data, Outreach, Campaigns

userStories.title: Services page — managed GTM offering
userStories.description: As a potential client, I want to understand Sixty Seconds' managed services so that I can decide whether to engage them.

userStories.title: Case Studies page with Viewpoint
userStories.description: As a potential customer, I want to see real results from Sixty Seconds' work so that I can trust their products and services.
acceptanceCriteria: Case study index page with cards
Full Viewpoint case study with both testimonials
userStories.notes: Viewpoint testimonials from Joanna McNamara and Geordan Mandell

userStories.title: Blog system with MDX
userStories.description: As a content creator, I want to publish blog posts via MDX files so that we can build SEO/AEO/GEO presence.
acceptanceCriteria: Blog index at /blog with post cards
Frontmatter: title, description, date, author, tags, image, slug
OG + Twitter Card meta tags per post
userStories.notes: At least 1 seed post for launch

userStories.title: About page — lean team + company story
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to learn about the team and company history so that I can assess trustworthiness.
acceptanceCriteria: Founder card: Andrew Bryce with photo placeholder, title, bio
Team of X section with culture snippet

userStories.title: Contact page
userStories.description: As a prospect, I want to easily get in touch so that I can start a conversation.
acceptanceCriteria: Contact form: name, email, company, message
userStories.notes: Form submits to edge function or email service

userStories.title: SEO/AEO/GEO foundation
userStories.description: As a marketer, I want every page to have proper structured data and meta tags for search and AI discoverability.
acceptanceCriteria: Global Head component with title, description, canonical, OG tags, Twitter cards
Semantic HTML with proper heading hierarchy

userStories.title: Vercel deployment config
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the corporate site deployable to Vercel independently at sixtyseconds.ai.
acceptanceCriteria: vercel.json with correct monorepo build config
